scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key components from gold standard: ContainerPath (absolute-only, Pebble-backed), ensure_contents signature and return semantics, LocalPath, PathProtocol, installation/import. Default mode 0o644 = 420 decimal matches gold standard. PebbleConnectionError correctly noted (as ops.pebble.ConnectionError).
scores.hallucination_notes: none — extra methods listed (unlink, rmdir, is_file, is_dir, read_bytes) are plausible pathlib-compatible extensions; the full example is coherent and consistent with documented APIs
